本来，赛迦守护宇宙几百万年了，想过一段时间普通人的生活，可恰巧遇到刚刚复活的贝利亚来抢夺永恒核心！

甚至，由于赛迦的奇特长相，贝利亚还把他当做新生代奥特曼，想要解决掉他然后带走永恒核心。

赛迦自然不惯着，直接动手消灭对方！

本以为这就结束了，却没想到，塔尔塔洛斯觉得抢夺光之国的等离子火花塔难度太高，也把目标放在了永恒核心上……","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/4d203a939b08c6b285670bffb7236900","author":"实习小财神","author_id":"","book_id":"7594540963595308057","book_name":"开局赛迦，贝利亚当我新生代战士","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#102038","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"6.2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":39,"name":"二次元","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=39&name=二次元&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":367,"name":"奥特同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=367&name=奥特同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7604085555617333785","read_count":"61082","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"187122"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"89","tags":"动漫衍生,二次元,奥特同人,开局,同人,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/512e5510849bb42af56216027a5f9109~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779318915&x-signature=ZSSsqJpYHc5quOmje51gzQPiELg%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"95966612485","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"15"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322071515DE01A5DB11634B709EB2"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读43分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg
